name: E-6 recommended sets: recommended_set must list a subset of rule ids in rules: per §17 G-2 + E-6
command:
mkdir -p tree && printf 'source:
  id: g
rules:
  - id: g-x-001
recommended_set: [g-x-001]
all_set: [g-x-001]
' > tree/g.yaml && grep -q '^recommended_set:' tree/g.yaml && grep -q 'g-x-001' tree/g.yaml && echo subset 1>&2
